description: Web Bluetooth SDK for iOS Safari
name: ioswebble-sdk

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/detect && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/profiles && npm run build -w packages/react-sdk && npm run build -w packages/testing && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm run build -w packages/mcp
scripts.test:packages: npm test -w packages/core -w packages/profiles -w packages/react-sdk -w packages/testing -w packages/detect -w packages/cli -w packages/mcp -w packages/skill --if-present
scripts.publish:packages: npm run build:packages && npm publish -w packages/detect && npm publish --tag beta -w packages/core && npm publish --tag beta -w packages/profiles && npm publish --tag beta -w packages/react-sdk && npm publish -w packages/mcp && npm publish -w packages/cli && npm publish -w packages/skill && npm publish --tag beta -w packages/testing
scripts.publish:dry: npm run build:packages && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/detect && npm publish --dry-run --tag beta -w packages/core && npm publish --dry-run --tag beta -w packages/profiles && npm publish --dry-run --tag beta -w packages/react-sdk && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/mcp && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/cli && npm publish --dry-run -w packages/skill && npm publish --dry-run --tag beta -w packages/testing
